description.narrative: Humanitarian Context: In Ethiopia, over 28,6 million people are estimated to be in need of humanitarian assistance due to multiple overlapping humanitarian crises (OCHA, 20231 ). According to the humanitarian response plan (HRP) 20232 , over 4.5 million internally displaced people (IDPs) require humanitarian assistance in 2023. The HRP 2023 document clearly puts that of the total population, 20 million people estimated to be experiencing food insecurity and 4,9 million need life sustaining protection services. Of the people in need of protection services, 56% are children, 25% are women, and 17% are people with disabilities. As of October, the 2023 Ethiopia HRP was only 30% funded.

title.narrative: Ethiopia Joint Response 2024-2026 (Respond to the high needs of affected childre

description.narrative: Humanitarian Context: In Ethiopia, over 28,6 million people are estimated to be in need of humanitarian assistance due to multiple overlapping humanitarian crises (OCHA, 20231 ). According to the humanitarian response plan (HRP) 20232 , over 4.5 million internally displaced people (IDPs) require humanitarian assistance in 2023. The HRP 2023 document clearly puts that of the total population, 20 million people estimated to be experiencing food insecurity and 4,9 million need life sustaining protection services. Of the people in need of protection services, 56% are children, 25% are women, and 17% are people with disabilities. As of October, the 2023 Ethiopia HRP was only 30% funded.

description.narrative: People Reached - Direct

title.narrative: People Reached - Family and Community Members (Direct)

description.narrative: People Reached - Family and Community Members (Direct)
People Reached - CSO Representatives (Direct)
People Reached - Government Officials (Direct)
People Reached - Law Enforcement Agencies (Direct)
People Reached - Private Sector Staff (Direct)
People Reached - Others (Direct)

Humanitarian Context: In Ethiopia, over 28,6 million people are estimated to be in need of humanitarian assistance due to multiple overlapping humanitarian crises (OCHA, 20231 ). According to the humanitarian response plan (HRP) 20232 , over 4.5 million internally displaced people (IDPs) require humanitarian assistance in 2023. The HRP 2023 document clearly puts that of the total population, 20 million people estimated to be experiencing food insecurity and 4,9 million need life sustaining protection services. Of the people in need of protection services, 56% are children, 25% are women, and 17% are people with disabilities. As of October, the 2023 Ethiopia HRP was only 30% funded.
